# @tyravel/storage-aws-s3

AWS S3 storage driver for Tyravel

## Install

```bash
npm install @tyravel/storage-aws-s3
```

| Field | Value |

| Version | `1.0.2` |
| Source | [`packages/storage-aws-s3`](https://github.com/thesimonharms/tyravel/tree/main/packages/storage-aws-s3) |

| Node.js | `>=26` |
